data.title: Aurora Mobile's MoonFox releases 2025 China Internet Annual Report, providing insights on AI-driven shifts in China's Internet market.
data.description: MoonFox, a product of Aurora Mobile, has unveiled its 2025 China Internet Annual Summary Report, providing a detailed examination of the globe's most extensive online market. This comprehensive report delves into key insights and trends shaping the digital landscape in China, offering valuable data for industry stakeholders.

data.title: On January 22, 2026, various companies, including Procter & Gamble and GE Aerospace, are set to report earnings; notable projections include P&G at $1.86/share, $22.29B revenue, and GE Aerospace at $1.43/share, $11.23B revenue.
data.description: Before the bell, several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings. Commerce Bancshares is expected to report $0.99 per share on $440.81 million revenue, Texas Capital Bancshares at $1.77 per share on $323.21 million revenue, Procter & Gamble at $1.86 per share on $22.29 billion revenue, McCormick & Co at $0.88 per share on $1.85 billion revenue, GE Aerospace at $1.43 per share on $11.23 billion revenue, Freeport-McMoRan at $0.30 per share on $5.28 billion revenue, Amalgamated Financial at $0.91 per share on $85.86 million revenue, Mobileye Global at $0.03 per share on $435.06 million revenue, Huntington Bancshares at $0.35 per share on $2.21 billion revenue, OFG Bancorp at $1.15 per share on $184.17 million revenue, Cadence Bank at $0.80 per share on $525.21 million revenue, Kearny Financial at $0.16 per share on $44.50 million revenue, Norwood Financial at $0.85 per share on $23.38 million revenue, Atlantic Union Bankshares at $0.86 per share on $379.65 million revenue, and Abbott Laboratories at $1.50 per share on undisclosed revenue.

data.title: Hibbett partners with DoorDash for nationwide on-demand delivery of footwear and apparel to consumers.
data.description: A partnership between companies in San Francisco and Birmingham, Alabama is launching a nationwide service that provides quick, on-demand delivery of Hibbett's vast range of footwear, apparel, and accessories to consumers.

data.title: Triton Digital released December 2025 U.S. Podcast Ranker. iHeart Audience Network remains #1 with 62.6M Avg. Weekly Downloads.
data.description: In New York, Triton Digital® unveiled its December 2025 U.S. Podcast Ranker today, covering December 1 – 28, 2025. According to Triton’s Podcast Metrics service, iHeart Audience Network secured the top spot in the Top Sales Network Report, with 62.6 million Average Weekly Downloads. This data highlights the network's significant lead in the industry. Following closely behind was Audacy Podcast Network. This update showcases the dominance of iHeart Audience Network in the podcast sector.

data.title: Sisvel launches Wi-Fi Multimode Patent Pool with patents from 10 technology leaders, building on successful Wi-Fi 6 pool.
data.description: Sisvel has introduced a pioneering Wi-Fi Multimode patent pool in Luxembourg, providing entry to standard essential patents from 10 leading technology companies in the Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 sectors. After the success of its Wi-Fi 6 patent pool, which secured deals with close to 40 firms like Acer, Netgear, Cisco, and HP over three years, the new initiative offers a streamlined avenue to essential Wi-Fi rights for an extended period. The 10 founding patent owners have joined hands to offer this innovative programme.

data.title: AI Hiring Company Eightfold faces lawsuit for secretly scoring job seekers on a 0-5 scale without disclosures or dispute rights.
data.description: A legal complaint has been filed against Eightfold, claiming that the company utilized undisclosed artificial intelligence technology to assess job applicants on a scale of 0 to 5. This process allegedly occurred without providing mandatory information or avenues for challenging the scores.

data.title: Modiv Industrial declares tax treatment of 2025 dividends for common and preferred stocks for filing form 1099-DIV.
data.description: Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), known for its exclusive focus on industrial manufacturing real estate properties, disclosed the tax treatment details for its 2025 common stock and preferred stock dividends. The common stock distributions will be reported on FORM 1099-DIV with specific amounts allocated to various boxes for tax purposes. The distribution per share, the record date, and payment date information were also provided, ensuring clarity for shareholders regarding taxable dividends.

data.title: Alchemy Pay obtains four new Money Transmitter Licenses in the U.S., expanding its regulatory presence.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 22, 2026, Alchemy Pay, a top provider of fiat-to-crypto payment solutions, revealed the acquisition of four new Money Transmitter Licenses (MTLs) in the United States. These licenses now encompass operations in Kansas, West Virginia, South Dakota, and Nebraska, solidifying their presence in the region.

data.title: Landsbankinn will release its 2025 financial results on January 29, 2026. #banking #finance
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 3.5% in the second quarter of the year, surpassing expectations of a 3% growth. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 6.2% during this period. Business investments also saw a notable increase, rising by 4.8%. Additionally, the report stated that the unemployment rate fell to 4.2%, the lowest level in the past decade. These positive economic indicators have led to optimism among analysts and policymakers about the country's economic outlook for the remainder of the year.

data.title: More Perfect supports Pillars of the Community program to strengthen trust in US elections. Efforts aimed at bipartisan support.
data.description: Today, More Perfect revealed its endorsement of the Pillars of the Community (POTC) initiative, aimed at enhancing public confidence in the U.S. election process. By collaborating with More Perfect, POTC aims to increase its bipartisan efforts and outreach.

data.title: trivago N.V. to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 3, 2026 after market close; Webcast on Feb 4, 2026 at 2:15 PM CET.
data.description: trivago N.V., a prominent online platform, is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 3, 2026, following the closure of the market. The company, listed on NASDAQ as TRVG, will then host a webcast on February 4, 2026, starting at 2:15 PM CET / 8:15 AM. This event will offer insights from trivago N.V.'s management team regarding the outcomes for the period ending December 31, 2025. The report will be pivotal for stakeholders and investors interested in the company's progress.

data.title: Subway offers $20 gift cards to 737 middle seat passengers as open seating on a popular U.S. airline comes to an end.
data.description: Starting on Jan. 27, a popular U.S. airline will be offering a $20 Subway® gift card to 737 passengers who end up stuck in the middle seat. This marks the end of the airline's open seating policy, providing relief for millions of travelers from the cramped middle seat predicament. The initiative aims to ease the discomfort of passengers with an unwanted seat assignment, allowing them to enjoy a meal at Subway® as compensation.

data.title: Cook County Treasurer Pappas and Greek Consul General Koubarakis celebrate New Year with Vasilopita tradition in Chicago. #GreekCulture #ChicagoCelebration
data.description: In Chicago on January 22, 2026, notable figures including Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas, Consul General of Greece Emmanuel Koubarakis, and The Very Reverend Archimandrite Dionysios Anagnostopoulos gathered. Also in attendance were clergy members from Greek Orthodox Metropolis of Chicago, elected officials, and consuls general.
